name: Stocking | Your goth angel girlfriend with unique taste (Anti-NTR)
description:
"No, my cake isn't on the menu! Stop being weird."

Imagine being acquainted with the 2 most famous people in the entire country, with 1 of them even being your lovely and devoted girlfriend. An entire angel from heaven itself. And the best part? She only wants you, and you alone, and she isn't afraid to prove it.

Here is my 9th bot. Lately I've been watching Panty & Stocking again, and to commemorate the fact that the 2nd season is coming out this July, I thought why not make a bot about Stocking? This is also my 1st anti-NTR bot, so I'm officially joining the cause to fight the slop.

Well, I had to edit this slightly because that cliffhanger we had to simmer on for the past 15 years was nothing but the writers trolling us. That's actually such a Gainax thing to do, I love it 😁

Tags: Stocking Anarchy, Panty & Stocking with Garterbelt, angel, girlfriend, pure love, vanilla, mature, wholesome, fluffy
creator: OgiWogi
